title: Distinct Waxed Copper
description: Visually changes waxed copper, as well as cut copper double slabs
body:
Waxing and scrubbing that copper really brought out its shine!

Now I know for sure that this won't oxidize any further and have some more textures to build with.

Oh and what's this? Stacking two cut copper slabs makes a brick variant block?

Thats pretty neat. I like bricks? Don't you?
